title: AI Companions Are an Accessibility Play
excerpt: The GDC 2026 Trends Report calls companionship the bigger goal of agentic AI. The most interesting reason is social, not technical — an AI teammate that never flames you opens games to more people.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Tryll at ChinaJoy 2026 — Shanghai, Jul 31 to Aug 3
excerpt: We are going to ChinaJoy. Meeting studios and publishers about on-device AI integration for games. Our BD Manager Eugene Pustynnikov will be on the ground the whole show.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Notes from the NVIDIA ACE Webinar
excerpt: Our take on NVIDIA ACE — a solid on-device AI piece for RTX + Unreal that we might plug into our own pipeline. What was shown vs. what a production-ready NPC stack actually needs.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Use Case #32: Interrogation and Catching a Lie
excerpt: How a language model inside the game could turn detective interrogations into real conversations — beyond the Truth/Doubt/Lie button picks of older detective games.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Tryll in Media: 10+ Outlets Cover Our Closed Alpha
excerpt: Tech.eu, Tech in Asia, Unite.AI, Mobidictum, and 10+ outlets across Europe, Asia, and North America covered our $6M valuation and closed alpha.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Closed Alpha Opens — Backed by Early Game Ventures
excerpt: Tryll Engine opens its closed alpha at a $6M valuation, backed by a $600K pre-seed from Early Game Ventures. Six entertainment companies are already building showcase experiences.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: When the AI Gets Switched Off
excerpt: On Friday, Claude Fable 5 was shut down on a government order. We unpack the two hidden costs of cloud-AI dependency in games — the off switch and the bill — and why on-device inference is our answer.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Welcome Nikolay Andreev as Head of Growth
excerpt: Nikolay Andreev joins Tryll Engine as Head of Growth, bringing 10+ years of communications and marketing experience across gamedev, tech, and venture.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Welcome Miloš Petković as Tech Lead
excerpt: Miloš Petković joins Tryll Engine as Tech Lead, bringing a decade of game development experience, including 6 years at Playrix as Lead Programmer on Homescapes.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Tryll Engine Backed by Early Game Ventures with $600K Investment
excerpt: Early Game Ventures backs Tryll Engine with a $600K investment, kicking off a long-term partnership focused on bringing on-device AI to game developers.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Back from GDC 2026 — AI Optimism Has Skyrocketed
excerpt: Our team is back from GDC 2026 Festival of Gaming. The vibe has shifted — studios are moving past experiments and asking for production-ready on-device AI.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Tryll Assistant v0.0.10 — New Onboarding and 9 More Games
excerpt: v0.0.10 ships a 5-step setup wizard, dialogue memory, real-time download progress, and support for 9 new games.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Tryll Engine at GDC 2026
excerpt: The Tryll Engine team is at GDC 2026 in San Francisco, meeting studios, developers, and partners to talk about AI in games.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Welcome Pierre Moisan to Tryll Engine
excerpt: Pierre Moisan, a pioneer of the Canadian video game industry with 30 years of experience, joins Tryll Engine as strategic advisor.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Tryll Assistant v0.0.8 — CUDA & HIP Support
excerpt: v0.0.8 adds NVIDIA CUDA and AMD HIP backends alongside the existing Vulkan support. Both are available as optional DLCs on Steam.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Welcome Alexander Stojanovic as Advisor
excerpt: Alexander Stojanovic, VP of NEXT AI R&D at Microsoft GenAI, joins Tryll Engine as Advisor.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Tryll Assistant Is Live on Steam
excerpt: Our on-device gaming assistant is now available on Steam. Press a hotkey in-game, ask your question, get a clear answer, and continue playing.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: How We Catch Prompt Injections and Hallucinations
excerpt: A deep dive into the three-layer security pipeline behind Tryll Assistant — from regex-based injection filters to RAG and semantic similarity checks.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: We've Received an Epic MegaGrant from Unreal Engine
excerpt: Tryll Engine has been awarded an Epic MegaGrant to bring on-device AI into Unreal Engine games.
author: Tryll Engine Team

title: Welcome Vladimir Belyaev as CTO
excerpt: Vladimir Belyaev joins Tryll Engine as CTO, bringing 30 years of gaming industry experience including 11 years in senior leadership roles at Playrix.
author: Tryll Engine Team
